etymology.description: semantic ťęü(ťęü) (bińĀo, "long hair") + phonetic ŚÖí(ŚÖí) (√©r) -> hair, beard
etymology.interpretation: The character ťęĶ combines the semantic ťęü(ťęü) (bińĀo, "long hair"), which conveys the connection to hair or beard, with the phonetic element ŚÖí(ŚÖí) (√©r), which provides the sound. The combination effectively describes hair or beard, both recurring concepts linked to long hair.
